title: Terminate #77 and diagnose meme seat selection bug

log.context: Terminate #77 and diagnose meme seat selection bug

The temporal-worker was last started at **01:48:39 UTC**. The fix was committed at 20:35:28 UTC the previous day (March 26). The worker has been running since 01:48:39 UTC on March 27 — AFTER the fix was deployed. Congress #76 started at 01:53:39 UTC — also AFTER the worker restart. So the fix was active for #76.

This means congress #76 DID run with the fixed code. And yet only Trump debated. Let me look at this from a different angle — maybe the `[meme-congress]` trigger simply wasn't used for...(truncated)
